lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਚੇਤਿ ਤੂ ਮਨਹੁ ਤਜਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: e man har jeeo chet too manahu taj vikaar |
lines.english: O my mind, remember the Dear Lord, and abandon the corruption of your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਸਚਿ ਲਗੀ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad dhiaae too sach lagee piaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditate on the Word of the Guru's Shabad; focus lovingly on the Truth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਨੀ ਸਭਿ ਭਵਾਈਅਨਿ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jonee sabh bhavaaeean bisattaa maeh samaae |2|
lines.english: He shall wander in all sorts of reincarnations, and rot away in manure. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਭੁਲਿਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਹਥੁ ਕਿਥਾਊ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aithai naavahu bhuliaa fir hath kithaaoo na paae |
lines.english: One who forgets the Name in this world, shall not find any place of rest anywhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee gur paaeaa poorab likhiaa maae |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I have found the Guru, according to my pre-ordained destiny, O my mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anadin sachee bhagat kar sachaa le milaae |3|
lines.english: Night and day, I practice true devotional worship; I am united with the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape srisatt sabh saajeean aape nadar karee |
lines.english: He Himself fashioned the entire universe; He Himself bestows His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vaddiaaeea jai bhaavai tai dee |4|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is glorious and great; as He pleases, He bestows His Blessings. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਛਲੇ ਗੁਨਹ ਬਖਸਾਇ ਜੀਉ ਅਬ ਤੂ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: pichhale gunah bakhasaae jeeo ab too maarag paae |
lines.english: Please forgive my past mistakes, O my Dear Lord; now, please place me on the Path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗਿ ਰਹਾ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har kee charanee laag rahaa vichahu aap gavaae |1|
lines.english: I remain attached to the Lord's Feet, and eradicate self-conceit from within. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man guramukh naam har dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, as Gurmukh, meditate on the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗਿ ਰਹਾ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਏਕੈ ਭਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa har charanee laag rahaa ik man ekai bhaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remain attached forever to the Lord's Feet, single-mindedly, with love for the One Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮੈ ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਪਤਿ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਮੈ ਥੇਹੁ ਨ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naa mai jaat na pat hai naa mai thehu na thaau |
lines.english: I have no social status or honor; I have no place or home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਲਚ ਕਰਦਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਲਾਲਚਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man laalach karadaa firai laalach laagaa jaae |
lines.english: This mind wanders around, driven by greed, totally attached to greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਭੇਦਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਆ ਸਮਝਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabad bhed bhram kattiaa gur naam deea samajhaae |2|
lines.english: Pierced through by the Word of the Shabad, my doubts have been cut away. The Guru has inspired me to understand the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧੈ ਕੂੜਿ ਵਿਆਪਿਆ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhandhai koorr viaapiaa jam pur chottaa khaae |3|
lines.english: He is engrossed in false pursuits; he shall endure beatings in the City of Death. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sabh kichh aape aap hai doojaa naahee koe |
lines.english: O Nanak, God Himself Himself is all-in-all. There is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਟੋਲਿ ਲਹੁ ਸੇ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sach rate se ttol lahu se virale sansaar |
lines.english: Seek and find those who are imbued with Truth; they are so rare in this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਖਜਾਨਾ ਬਖਸਿਓਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhagat khajaanaa bakhasion guramukhaa sukh hoe |4|3|
lines.english: He bestows the treasure of devotional worship, and the Gurmukhs abide in peace. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਮੁਖੁ ਉਜਲਾ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tin miliaa mukh ujalaa jap naam muraar |1|
lines.english: Meeting with them, one's face becomes radiant and bright, chanting the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa saachaa saahib ridai samaal |
lines.english: O Baba, contemplate and cherish the True Lord and Master within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਪੁਛਿ ਦੇਖੁ ਲੇਹੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਭਾਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur apanaa puchh dekh lehu vakhar bhaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Seek out and see, and ask your True Guru, and obtain the true commodity. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਭ ਸੇਵਦੀ ਧੁਰਿ ਭਾਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik sachaa sabh sevadee dhur bhaag milaavaa hoe |
lines.english: All serve the One True Lord; through pre-ordained destiny, they meet Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh mile se na vichhurreh paaveh sach soe |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs merge with Him, and will not be separated from Him again; they attain the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik bhagatee saar na jaananee manamukh bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: Some do not appreciate the value of devotional worship; the self-willed manmukhs are deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਕਰਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: onaa vich aap varatadaa karanaa kichhoo na jaae |3|
lines.english: They are fillled with self-conceit; they cannot accomplish anything. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਲਿ ਜੋਰੁ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਖਲੇ ਕੀਚੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis naal jor na chalee khale keechai aradaas |
lines.english: Stand and offer your prayer, to the One who cannot be moved by force.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਕਰੇ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh naam man vasai taa sun kare saabaas |4|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides within the mind of the Gurmukh; hearing his prayer, the Lord applauds him. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਤੇ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਕਰੇ ਮਨੂਰਹੁ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo te seetal kare manoorahu kanchan hoe |
lines.english: He transforms the burning desert into a cool oasis; he transmutes rusted iron into gold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so saachaa saalaaheeai tis jevadd avar na koe |1|
lines.english: So praise the True Lord; there is none other as great as He is. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਅਰਾਧਿ ਤੂ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bachan araadh too anadin gun gaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Contemplate the Word of the Guru's Teachings, and sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, night and day. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mere man anadin dhiaae har naau |
lines.english: O my mind, night and day, meditate on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh eko jaaneeai jaa satigur dee bujhaae |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, one comes to know the One Lord, when the True Guru instructs him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿਦੂ ਏਹ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so satigur saalaaheeai jidoo eeh sojhee paae |2|
lines.english: Praise the True Guru, who imparts this understanding. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੀ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jam pur badhe maareeeh bahutee milai sajaae |3|
lines.english: Bound and gagged in the City of Death, they will be beaten. They will be punished severely. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗੇ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਨਿ ਅਗੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur chhodd doojai lage kiaa karan agai jaae |
lines.english: Those who forsake the True Guru, and attach themselves to duality - what will they do when they go to the world hereafter?
